title: Complete cheapest safe ordinary path lane

completion_criteria: Docs and ordinary report guidance define phase questions as the ordinary product design unit.
Visible surfaces have action-changing disposition and routed boundaries.
Artifact lifecycle classes and minimal survivor shape are defined.
Restart/continuation scenarios are exposed as design tests.
Ordinary report guidance exposes affordance-first lane packets before command choices.
Focused runtime test and maintainer-surface validation pass.

goal: Complete active lane #1739 so ordinary Agentic Workspace operation is framed around the cheapest safe path: phase questions, visible-surface value, lifecycle compression, restart validation, and affordance-first packets.
non_goals: Do not introduce new root commands or broad command-generation restructuring in this slice.
Do not create app, dependency, database, schema, or unrelated scaffold files.

execution_bounds.max changed files: Keep to planning records, the package docs, one ordinary-output implementation surface, and focused tests unless validation proves another generated surface must refresh.

stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: The work turns into broad generated-command restructuring or unrelated product setup.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: Focused tests, maintainer surfaces, summary, or planning doctor fail and cannot be repaired in scope.

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open.
